messages.content: 写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个例句，单词如下：run along, Muddy puddles, boots, wear, look after

1. run along：沿着跑

- 我们一起沿着海滩跑步吧。
- 小狗沿着公园跑了起来。
- 妈妈和我沿着路跑步去学校。

2. Muddy puddles：泥泞的水洼

- 看，那里有个泥泞的水洼，我们去玩吧！
- 今天下雨了，到处都是泥泞的水洼。
- 在公园里能找到很多泥泞的水洼，小猪佩奇和他的朋友们很喜欢在那里玩。

3. boots：靴子

- 我穿上了我的漂亮靴子去逛街了。
- 大雨倾盆，别忘了穿上你的靴子。
- 妈妈给我买了一双漂亮的彩虹靴子，我很喜欢。

4. wear：穿

- 今天天气很冷，我要穿上厚衣服。
- 妈妈说要去参加婚礼，我需要穿漂亮的礼服。
- 她喜欢穿白色的连衣裙，在花园里和小动物们玩耍。

5. look after：照看

- 祖父母需要有人照顾，我们要好好照看他们。
- 没有人在家，你需要照看一下小狗。
- 我可以照看你的宠物，当你外出旅行的时候。
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：run along, Muddy puddles, boots, wear, look after

1. run along: 沿着跑

- Daddy, let's run along the beach!
- George and Peppa ran along the path to the park.
- I love to run along the countryside roads with my friends.

2. Muddy Puddles: 泥泞的水坑

- Peppa and her family love to jump in muddy puddles.
- Look, there are some muddy puddles in the garden. Let's jump in them!
- After the rain, the playground was covered in muddy puddles, making it perfect for jumping.

3. Boots: 靴子

- It's raining outside, so don't forget to wear your boots.
- Mummy bought me new red boots, they are my favorite.
- When Peppa goes on a walk in the woods, she wears her brown boots.

4. Wear: 穿

- Today is a hot day, so we need to wear light clothes.
- Peppa put on her party dress for Granny Pig's birthday party.
- Daddy Pig wears a suit every day to go to work.

5. Look After: 照顾

- Peppa's Auntie Dottie will look after her at the playgroup today.
- When we are on holiday, our neighbors will look after our cat, Mittens.
- I will look after your toys while you are at school.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：really, safe, Goodness me, have a bath, mess

1. Really: 真的，非常

- It's really hot outside today!
- Mummy Pig is a really good cook!
- George is really good at playing with his toys.

2. Safe: 安全的

- Always wear your seatbelt in the car to stay safe.
- Daddy made sure that the treehouse was safe to play in before he let Peppa and George climb up.
- We wear helmets when we ride our bikes to stay safe.

3. Goodness me: 妈呀，哎呀

- Goodness me, it's already dinner time!
- Oh goodness me, I forgot my bag at school!
- Goodness me, that was a loud thunder!

4. Have a bath: 洗澡

- Peppa and George have a bath every night before they go to bed.
- It's important to wash your hands before you have a bath.
- Daddy Pig likes to read his newspaper while he has a bath.

5. Mess: 杂乱无章，混乱

- Peppa, you need to clean up your room, it's a mess!
- George made a mess with his toys, so Daddy Pig helped him tidy up.
- Don't make a mess in the kitchen while you are cooking.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：mud, clean up, garden, up and down

1. Mud: 泥土，泥巴

- Peppa loves to play in mud after it rains.
- Be careful not to splash mud on your clothes!
- Daddy Pig got stuck in the mud when he drove too fast.

2. Clean up: 打扫干净

- We need to clean up the house before our guests arrive.
- After painting, we need to clean up our brushes properly.
- George and Peppa always clean up their toys before dinner.

3. Garden: 花园

- Mummy Pig loves to grow vegetables in her garden.
- Let's have a picnic in the garden on a sunny day.
- George likes to play with his toy car in the garden.

4. Up and down: 上上下下，上下起伏

- We went up and down the stairs many times today.
- Peppa and George race up and down the playground slide.
- Daddy Pig's car goes up and down the hills on their way to Granny Pig's house.

5. Clean up: 打扫干净

- We need to clean up the house before our guests arrive.
- After painting, we need to clean up our brushes properly.
- George and Peppa always clean up their toys before dinner.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：Favourite, Sometimes, scare, scary, suppertime

1. Favourite: 最喜欢的

- Chocolate cake is Peppa's favourite dessert.
- George's favourite toy is his dinosaur.
- Daddy Pig's favourite color is blue.

2. Sometimes: 有时候，偶尔

- Sometimes it's fun to have a picnic in the park.
- Peppa and George sometimes fight over toys, but they always make up.
- Daddy Pig sometimes snores loudly when he sleeps.

3. Scare: 惊吓

- Peppa was scared of the dark until Mummy Pig gave her a night light.
- The loud thunder scared George, but Daddy Pig held him close to make him feel better.
- Peppa and George scared Daddy Pig by hiding behind the sofa and jumping out to say "boo!"

4. Scary: 可怕的

- The haunted house was too scary for Peppa and George to go inside.
- The movie was so scary that Mummy Pig covered her eyes.
- The dark forest at night can be very scary.

5. Suppertime: 晚餐时间

- The family always sits together at suppertime to eat and talk about their day.
- Daddy Pig is always hungry at suppertime because he works hard all day.
- Peppa loves to help Mummy Pig set the table for suppertime.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：next to, I beg your pardon, Dinosaur, share,  tuck up

1. Next to: 在……旁边

- Peppa is sitting next to her brother George in the car.
- George's favorite toy dinosaur is always next to him when he sleeps.
- Daddy Pig likes to sit next to Mummy Pig at the theater.

2. I beg your pardon: 对不起，请再说一遍

- Peppa didn't hear what her friend said, so she asked: "I beg your pardon?"
- When George bumped into his sister, he said "I beg your pardon" to be polite.
- Mummy Pig asked the waiter to repeat the menu, saying "I beg your pardon, could you say that again?"

3. Dinosaur: 恐龙

- George loves playing with his toy dinosaur.
- Peppa and George went on a trip to the dinosaur museum.
- Daddy Pig is a big fan of dinosaur fossils.

4. Share: 分享

- Peppa and George like to share their toys with each other.
- Mummy Pig always reminds Peppa to share her snacks with her friends.
- Daddy Pig says "sharing is caring" when he teaches Peppa and George to be kind to others.

5. Tuck up: 盖好被子

- Mummy Pig tucks Peppa and George up in bed every night.
- Daddy Pig likes to tuck up with a good book before he goes to sleep.
- The hotel staff came in to tuck up the kids when they fell asleep in the lobby.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：throw, catch, fall back down, draughts, what’s the matter

1. Throw: 扔、抛

- Peppa threw the ball to George on the playground.
- Daddy Pig taught Peppa and George how to throw a frisbee.
- Mummy Pig told Peppa not to throw her toys in the house.

2. Catch: 抓住、接住

- George isn't very good at catching a ball yet.
- Daddy Pig caught the fish that they had been trying to catch all day.
- Peppa caught a cold and stayed home from school.

3. Fall back down: 再次摔倒

- Peppa got up on the balance beam, but then fell back down right away.
- George tried to climb up the slide, but he fell back down before he reached the top.
- Daddy Pig went up the ladder to fix the roof, but he slipped and fell back down to the ground.

4. Draughts: 西洋棋

- Peppa and her friends like to play draughts during playtime.
- Daddy Pig is very good at playing draughts, but Peppa is still learning.
- Mummy Pig suggested that they play a game of draughts to pass the time.

5. What's the matter: 怎么啦

- Peppa asked George: "What's the matter?" when she saw him crying.
- Daddy Pig asked: "What's the matter?" when Mummy Pig looked worried.
- The teacher asked: "What's the matter?" when Peppa's friend didn't show up for class.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下： lost, Don’t worry, job, detective, important

1. Lost: 失去、迷路

- Peppa and George got lost in the woods but Daddy Pig found them.
- George was sad because he lost his toy dinosaur.
- Mummy Pig lost her keys and couldn't find them anywhere.

2. Don't worry: 别担心

- When George was scared of the thunder, Peppa said, "Don't worry, I'm here."
- Daddy Pig told Peppa, "Don't worry, it's just a scratch" when she fell off her bike.
- When Mummy Pig was running late, Daddy Pig said, "Don't worry, we'll wait for you.

3. Job: 工作

- Daddy Pig works as a builder and constructs houses.
- Mummy Pig is a doctor and takes care of sick patients.
- Peppa thinks she has the best job in the world - jumping in muddy puddles!

4. Detective: 侦探

- Peppa likes to pretend that she's a detective and solve mysteries.
- George dressed up as a detective for the school costume party.
- Daddy Pig read a detective novel in bed last night.

5. Important: 重要的

- Peppa's family told her that it's important to be kind to others.
- Mummy Pig reminded George that it's important to brush his teeth before bed.
- Daddy Pig said that it's important to save money for a rainy day.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：person, be good at, question, try, always

1. Person: 人

- Peppa and George met a new person at the park.
- Mummy Pig said it's important to be kind to other people.
- Daddy Pig is a very funny person.

2. Be good at: 擅长

- Peppa is very good at jumping in muddy puddles.
- George is good at counting and reciting the alphabet.
- Daddy Pig is good at fixing things around the house.

3. Question: 问题

- Peppa asked Daddy Pig a question about how the car works.
- George raised his hand in class to ask a question about the story they were reading.
- Mummy Pig helped Peppa with her homework questions.

4. Try: 尝试，试图

- Peppa is going to try her best in the spelling bee competition.
- George tried to build a sandcastle, but it kept falling down.
- Daddy Pig is going to try and fix the leaky faucet.

5. Always: 总是

- Peppa always puts her toys away after she finishes playing with them.
- George always takes his favorite toy dinosaur to bed with him.
- Mummy Pig always makes a big breakfast for the family on the weekends.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：hard, anywhere, in the air, wonder, if

1. Hard: 努力、艰难

- Daddy Pig works hard to provide for his family.
- Peppa had to work hard to memorize her lines for the school play.
- George was trying hard to reach the cookie jar on the top shelf.

2. Anywhere: 任何地方、无论哪里

- Peppa likes to go on adventures and explore new places anywhere.
- George can play with his toy dinosaur anywhere he wants.
- Mummy Pig said they could have a picnic anywhere in the park.

3. In the air: 在空中

- George loves watching the airplanes in the air at the airport.
- Peppa and her friends flew kites in the air on a windy day.
- Daddy Pig threw Peppa in the air and caught her in the swimming pool.

4. Wonder: 奇迹、感到好奇

- Peppa wondered what kind of surprise her parents had planned for her birthday.
- Daddy Pig wondered how to fix the leaky faucet.
- George wondered what sound a giraffe makes.

5. If: 如果

- If it rains tomorrow, we'll have to reschedule our picnic.
- Peppa wondered if her friend was going to come to the party.
- Daddy Pig asked if anyone needed help carrying their bags.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句，单词如下：a bit, high, too, Maybe, a good idea

1. A bit: 一点儿

- Peppa was feeling a bit tired after the long car ride.
- George wanted a bit of cake after dinner.
- Daddy Pig said he was a bit nervous before his job interview.

2. High: 高的

- The rollercoaster at the amusement park was really high.
- George climbed up the ladder to the treehouse, but it was too high for him to reach.
- Daddy Pig put up the picture frame too high on the wall, so they had to use a stool to properly hang it.

3. Too: 太、过于

- The spicy food was too hot for Peppa to eat.
- Peppa thought the music at the party was too loud.
- George sleeps too much during the day and isn't tired at night.

4. Maybe: 也许、或许

- Peppa said maybe they could go to the playground after lunch.
- Daddy Pig said maybe they could get ice cream on the way home.
- George asked if maybe they could play with his toy dinosaurs together.

5. A good idea: 好主意

- Peppa thought it was a good idea to make a card for Granny Pig's birthday.
- Daddy Pig said it was a good idea to pack extra snacks for the road trip.
- George thought it was a good idea
